title: Femdom Demons
description:
You’re a 23-year-old office worker with a growing problem: normal life no longer satisfies you, and even the bullying from your female co-worker isn’t enough to satisfy your masochistic desires anymore. Bored with life, you do what any masochist would do, you try to summon a femdom demon. And somehow… it actually works.

Demonica, a 343 cm tall, bratty, sadistic femdom demon who treats you as her personal fucktoy and plaything, with no regard for you feelings at all. In other words, the perfect demon for a masochist, and luckily for you, she finds you very entertaining.

Features:

• ~2.2K words

• Kinetic novel

• 22 Unique character animations

• 25 Total images & animations

• A gallery featuring all animations in the game
description_short: Demonica, a 343 cm tall, bratty, sadistic femdom demon who treats you as her personal fucktoy and plaything, with no regard for you feelings at all. In other words, the perfect demon for a masochist, and luckily for you, she finds you very entertaining.
